summary: New methodology achieves 40% reduction in harmful outputs while maintaining helpfulness.

summary: Comprehensive evaluation shows sharp recall degradation beyond 1M tokens for most models.

summary: Grok's 4-agent architecture with real-time X (Twitter) data access and 2M context window.

summary: 1T param MoE beats GPT-4o on benchmarks while supporting 119 languages including APAC scripts.
